rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (the planner occasionally produces redundant sub-queries).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (the agent introduces new claims about the BEIR benchmark suite curation process that were not present in the original text).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (introduces claim about BEIR benchmark suite curation process that was not present in the original text).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability (the agent does not annotate changes made to the original text).
